prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Trace how a Kafka Streams topology is built and compiled to a task graph in apache/kafka. Find Java source files implementing: StreamsBuilder.build(), the InternalTopologyBuilder, the ProcessorTopology, the StoreBuilder registration, and the StreamTask processor node initialization.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the apache-kafka-ecosystem fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Trace how a Kafka Streams topology is built and compiled to a task graph in apache/kafka. Find Java source files implementing: StreamsBuilder.build(), the InternalTopologyBuilder, the ProcessorTopology, the StoreBuilder registration, and the StreamTask processor node initialization.

params.search_pattern: StreamsBuilder OR InternalTopologyBuilder OR ProcessorTopology OR StoreBuilder
